title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions:
LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions!
